one thing i'd recommend is getting the crimson pulse covenant for kath (she has low critrate so you'll need the critrate boost at the level of investment you're at). also, if you have 3 daily globes, make sure to unlock her side story and clear it for her posse

the general burst combo you'll want to do is:
- have one of her cards in hand
- use her posse, which draws one of her cards and applies fiamma to it
- use her exalt, which draws 2 of her cards/use thais exalt to copy last stand (you can do this in either order)
- bounce her fiamma stacks around until you have hyperflare with 1 other card left in hand, cast hyperflare so that the fiamma bounces to the card you have left, and then repeat the next turn

early on at your level of investment you probably won't have the keyflare/aliemus generation to repeat this every turn, but you should be able to do it every couple of turns and the further you get the easier i'll be, until you get to the point where you can repeat that cycle every single turn to kill most bosses in a few burst turns

the core principle of this setup which makes it easy to play and consistent is the fact that kath (at base) only has 4 cards in deck, so the above loop guarantees all 4 cards in hand and enough fiamma to hit 10 combust for hyperflare every single turn, so there's no rng with it once it starts

if you want an example of the rotation/setup, here's a vid: https://streamable.com/h3sig3
